proposals.motive: Enhance error handling for external API calls to manage rate limits effectively.
Address high-risk vulnerabilities by updating the dot-prop dependency.
Define test scripts in package.json to facilitate testing procedures.
proposals.diff:
diff --git a/package.json b/package.json
--- a/package.json
+++ b/package.json
@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@
   "scripts": {
     "start": "ts-node src/index.ts",
     "dev": "ts-node-dev --respawn --transpile-only src/index.ts",
-    "test": "echo \"Error: no test specified\" && exit 1"
+    "test": "jest"
   },
   "keywords": [],
   "author": "AngelReml",

proposals.motive: Resolve licensing discrepancies by selecting a single valid license for the project.
